info.title: SaaS Boilerplate API
info.description: Organisation-first SaaS boilerplate API. v0.9.0 adds organisation feature entitlements, feature catalogue APIs and feature gate helper foundations, while retaining SSO/MFA configuration support. Every API is documented with Internal or External tags and explicit authentication requirements.

tags.name: External
tags.description: APIs intended for application clients or external consumers. Authentication requirements are shown per endpoint.

tags.name: Internal
tags.description: APIs intended for platform/admin/internal use. These usually require authentication and elevated permissions once auth is introduced.

BearerAuth.description: Generic bearer auth scheme. v0.9.0 supports user session tokens, scoped personal access tokens, organisation API tokens, MFA-aware token context metadata and SSO provider configuration guards.

UserSessionAuth.description: Short-lived logged-in user token. Used by the frontend, admin UI and Postman during development.

PersonalAccessTokenAuth.description: Active from v0.6.3. Long-lived user-owned scoped bearer token for Postman, scripts and user automation.

OrganisationApiTokenAuth.description: Active in v0.6.3. Organisation-owned token for external/system-to-system integrations. Uses external audience and external:* scopes.

ServiceAccountTokenAuth.description: Reserved for later service identity requirements.

mongo_ready_state.description: Mongoose connection ready state. 1 means connected.

auth_config.description: Organisation auth configuration placeholder. Full SSO support is planned for later versions.

password.description: Optional native-login password. Required for the user to log in with native authentication. Not returned by any API.
Optional native-login password. Required for the user to log in with native authentication. Not returned by any API.

message.example: MongoDB schema foundation is loaded and protected by RBAC.

client_secret_ref.description: Reference to a stored secret; the raw secret is not stored in this field.

access_token.description: JWT-style bearer token for authenticated API calls.

message.example: Logout acknowledged. Remove the bearer token from the client.

description.example: Default administrator role for the organisation
Can view and manage selected organisation data

scopes.description: Optional list of permission-key scopes. If omitted, the token receives the current user permission keys. Scopes cannot exceed current user permissions.

access_token.description: Raw bearer token. Returned once only.

message.example: Organisation API token created. Copy the access_token now; it will not be shown again.

access_token.description: Raw bearer token returned once only.

message.example: Organisation API token status updated successfully.

auth_config.description: Safe public subset of organisation authentication settings.

content_base64.description: Base64 file content. Data URL prefixes are accepted and stripped server-side.

get.description: External health check. Authentication: none.

post.description: Authenticates an active native user with email and password. Authentication: none. Returns a bearer token with user_id, organisation_id, email, role_ids, token_type, audience and scopes.

403.description: User or organisation is not active.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user, organisation, role summaries and flattened permission keys. Authentication: UserSessionAuth bearer token required. Required token type: user_session_token. Required audience: internal.

get.summary: Current token context and token policy
get.description: Returns the active token context for the authenticated request plus the v0.6.3 token type/audience/scope policy. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth bearer token required. Required audience: internal.

403.description: Token type or audience is not allowed.

post.description: Acknowledges logout for stateless bearer-token authentication and records an audit event. Authentication: UserSessionAuth bearer token required. Required token type: user_session_token. Required audience: internal.

get.description: Internal schema diagnostic endpoint. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: internal.schema.view.

post.description: Creates a new organisation tenant. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage.

get.description: Lists organisations with pagination, status filter and search. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.view.
Returns one organisation by id. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.view.

patch.description: Updates organisation profile/configuration fields. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage.
Updates organisation status. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: platform.organisations.manage.

post.description: Organisation-owned user endpoint. Tenant rule: user is created and queried only under the organisation id in the path. Users cannot exist without an organisation and email_normalised is globally unique. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: users.create + organisation access.

get.description: Organisation-owned user endpoint. Tenant rule: user is created and queried only under the organisation id in the path. Users cannot exist without an organisation and email_normalised is globally unique. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: users.view + organisation access.

Organisation-owned user endpoint. Tenant rule: user is created and queried only under the organisation id in the path. Users cannot exist without an organisation and email_normalised is globally unique. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: users.view + organisation access.

404.description: User not found in this organisation.

patch.description: Organisation-owned user endpoint. Tenant rule: user is created and queried only under the organisation id in the path. Users cannot exist without an organisation and email_normalised is globally unique. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: users.update + organisation access.

404.description: User not found in this organisation.

patch.description: Organisation-owned user endpoint. Tenant rule: user is created and queried only under the organisation id in the path. Users cannot exist without an organisation and email_normalised is globally unique. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: users.disable + organisation access.

404.description: User not found in this organisation.

get.description: Returns the current OpenAPI specification. Authentication: none in v0.6.3 local development; intended to become internal/admin protected later.
Interactive Swagger UI for the current API specification. Authentication: none in v0.6.3 local development; intended to become internal/admin protected later.
Lists global active/inactive permission keys. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: permissions.view.
Returns the global feature catalogue. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: features.view.
Returns the authenticated organisation's feature entitlement state. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: features.view.

patch.description: Enables or disables organisation-level feature flags. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: features.manage.

get.description: Lists roles for the logged-in user organisation. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: roles.view.

post.description: Creates a custom role in the logged-in user organisation. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: roles.manage.

get.description: Returns one role from the logged-in user organisation. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: roles.view.

patch.description: Updates role name, description or permission keys. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: roles.manage.

delete.description: Deletes a custom role if it is not a system role and is not assigned to users. Authentication: Bearer user session token required. Required permission/scope: roles.manage.

post.description: Creates a user-owned long-lived Personal Access Token for Postman, scripts and user automation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth required. Required permission: tokens.personal.manage. Requested token scopes cannot exceed the logged-in user permissions. The raw access_token is returned once only.

get.description: Lists Personal Access Token metadata for the authenticated user. Raw token values are never returned. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage.

delete.description: Soft-revokes a user-owned Personal Access Token. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.personal.manage.

post.description: Creates an organisation-owned API token for external/system-to-system integrations. Authentication: UserSessionAuth required. Required permission: tokens.organisation.manage. Requested scopes must be from the allowed external:* scope catalogue. The raw access_token is returned once only.

get.description: Lists organisation API token metadata for the authenticated user organisation. Raw token values are never returned. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage.

patch.description: Activates or revokes an organisation API token. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage. Expired tokens cannot be reactivated.

delete.description: Soft-revokes an organisation API token. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: tokens.organisation.manage.

get.description: External validation endpoint for organisation_api_token authentication. Authentication: OrganisationApiTokenAuth required. Required scope: external:organisation.read. This endpoint is included in v0.6.3 so external/system-to-system tokens can be tested before feature-specific external APIs are added.
Returns the safe public login branding and login policy for an organisation resolved by slug or domain. Authentication: none. Added in v0.7.0.
Returns branding and theme settings for the authenticated user organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.view.

patch.description: Updates branding settings for the authenticated user organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage.

get.description: Returns public organisation branding assets and theme tokens by organisation slug or verified domain. Authentication: none. Added in v0.8.2.
Serves a public branding asset uploaded for an organisation, such as logo, favicon or login background. Authentication: none. Added in v0.8.2.
Returns the authenticated organisation theme tokens. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.view. Added in v0.8.2.

patch.description: Updates organisation website theme tokens. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage. Added in v0.8.2.

get.description: Exports the authenticated organisation theme and branding asset references as YAML. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.view. Added in v0.8.2.

post.description: Imports a validated YAML theme configuration for the authenticated organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage. Added in v0.8.2.

Uploads a branding image as base64 JSON for the authenticated organisation. Supported assetType values: logo, favicon, login-background, sidebar-logo, email-logo. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage. Added in v0.8.2.

delete.description: Clears the stored URL/reference for a branding asset. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.branding.manage. Added in v0.8.2.

get.description: Returns safe public organisation authentication options by slug or domain. Authentication: none. Added in v0.8.2.
Returns the authenticated organisation auth configuration. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.auth.view. Added in v0.8.2.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated organisation login method, allowed domains, default role and SSO/MFA-ready settings. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.auth.manage. Added in v0.8.2.

get.description: Returns safe public MFA policy metadata by organisation slug or domain. Authentication: none. Added in v0.8.2.
Returns the authenticated organisation MFA policy. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.mfa.view. Added in v0.8.2.

patch.description: Updates provider-neutral MFA policy for the authenticated organisation. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.mfa.manage. Added in v0.8.2.

get.description: Returns safe public SSO login metadata by organisation slug or domain. Authentication: none. Added in v0.8.2.

Returns provider setup hints for Keycloak, Azure Entra ID, Okta, Google and custom OIDC. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.view. Added in v0.8.2.

Returns the authenticated organisation SSO provider configuration, validation result and redirect URI hints. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.view. Added in v0.8.2.

patch.description: Updates SSO provider configuration for Keycloak, Azure Entra ID, Okta, Google or custom OIDC. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.manage. Added in v0.8.2.

post.description: Runs local validation against the saved organisation SSO provider configuration. No outbound discovery request is performed in v0.8.2. Authentication: UserSessionAuth or PersonalAccessTokenAuth. Required permission/scope: organisation.sso.view. Added in v0.8.2.
